title: Halloween Mashup 2025 Concept Update
description: The Halloween Mashup 2015 pack from console updated to the latest versions
body:
![Halloween Mashup Concept Update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9df74c38d3f906b13ed90215c931ba883c9d5185.png)
# Halloween Mashup 2025 Concept Update

Halloween Mashup 2025 Concept Update is a resource pack that changes the new blocks, items, and some mobs as a concept of what if the Halloween Mashup pack kept updating past 1.21.3. This pack is intended to be used as an overlay for the [Halloween Mashup](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/halloween-mash-up) Resource Pack, and won't work properly without it



## Thanks to:

<details>
<summary>Credits</summary>

**Pigzone00:** For helping to choose and create the license, description, icon, tags, links, changelog and the resourcepack.

**BrandonItaly:** For porting the original Halloween Mash-Up 2015 resource pack to Java.

</details>
